feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to cancel / reverse the picked quantity from the pick list SAP Business one
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to cancel / reverse the picked quantity from the pick list SAP Business one?  

Or suggest the other workaround for same.

 

kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: SAP B1 for HANA Email Alerts showing a common Subject
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Does anyone know what settings need to be done, to change the standard subject line which is seen on all email alerts sent from SAP B1, as below:

Subject: SAP Business One mail message, the subject is in the message body   

 
These settings changed after scheduling reports from the Analytical Portal. Before that, the email subjects were the same as the alert subject.

entry.title: Updating Approved Documents not going for approval
entry.content:
We have noticed, that our PO entered via the Approval process can be updated by the originator or any other user and saved without the document going back for approval.
We have enabled the below option since we want the user to update the document if needed, but the document should be returned for approval.
If we disable the enable updating option, the user is not able to update the document at all. This is not our requirement.
In the earlier version of SAP, an updated document would be sent back for approval was working.
Could you please explain this behaviour from SAP B1 10?

entry.title: Authorization Issue on Connecting Addon getting Error For Two users, others are Working Fine
entry.content:
While connecting Addon getting error for particular users which were working for other users.

Working when full authorization given on UDT and UDO registrations under Customization, but working for others users with No authorization.

Tried copying authorization of working users, still same issue.

Attached error screenshot for reference.

SAP Business One

entry.title: Approval procedure using Query for 2 conditions UDF and Price
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need to trigger approval for PO based on header Level UDF and Price combination we are using below query and its throwing error

Query:
SELECT Distinct 'TRUE' FROM OPOR where $[OPOR."U_EA_Item"]='Y' and $[OPOR."DocTotal"]<10000

Error:

Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction

Please provide solution for this we need to have a approval procedure on 2 conditions at header level.

entry.title: Problem when opening add-on form in SAPB1.
entry.content:
When initializing the add-on, it creates new options in the modules menu, when clicking on them to deploy the form it does not appear, this has been happening to me repeatedly in SAP 10 FP2111 with HANA version.

The code I use is the following:

Public Sub LoadFormXML(ByVal FileName As String, ByRef SBO_Application As SAPbouiCOM.Application)

Dim oXmlDoc As Xml.XmlDocument
oXmlDoc = New Xml.XmlDocument
Dim sPath As String
sPath = IO.Directory.GetParent(System.Windows.Forms.Application.StartupPath).ToString
sPath = System.Environment.CurrentDirectory
oXmlDoc.Load(sPath & "\" & FileName)
SBO_Application.LoadBatchActions(oXmlDoc.InnerXml)

End Sub


It does not seem to give me problems in other SAP environments.
The error is solved automatically when opening any SAP window. Even if you leave the system log messages active, just by being active the error does not happen, but the correct thing is that no extra action is needed by SAP and the .xml forms are displayed without problem.

Has this happened to anyone and does anyone have a workaround for this?

entry.title: EDIWizard - Extend format for more details?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a question regarding the Electronic Documents Import Wizard and incoming XML-Invoice.
Is it possible to get more informations imported in the item-line than the standard provides?

For Example: In my incoming invoice there is area "InvoiceLine" and in the fist line there are additional information in the Tag <Note>.

I like to map the additional information Tag <Note> to an SAP B1 Field perhaps FreeTxt.

I tryed to edit the "eDoc PEPPOL - Marketing Documents Import (System).SPP"-File and imported as new one, but it doesn't work. The Mapping in EFM ist is Read Only.

I've read the Note 3306968 Electronic Documents Import Wizard Updates, but is it possible to edit that SPP-File for more information in details?

Product Version FP2405

Best Regards,
Daniela

*Sorry when the post is in the wrong location, but i had no other joice from the "location" choose box while creating the post.

entry.title: ApprovalRequest - Substitute Approval Using Service Layer
entry.content:
How should we send an object in the SAP Business One service layer to execute document approval where the approver is the substitute approver? This means that when the principal approver is on vacation, the substitute can carry out the approval. Currently, in SAP Business One, to perform an approval, we send the following object:
    "ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
        {
            "ApproverUserName": "Approver",
            "ApproverPassword": "ApproverPassword",
            "Status": "ardApproved"
        }
    ]

entry.title: JSON format using SQL query
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

 

I am asking how to make JSON format using SQL query.

This is the format:

{
     "InventoryCountingLines": [
        {
            "LineNumber": 1,
            "ItemCode": "1",
            "WarehouseCode": "1",
            "BinEntry":1,
            "InventoryCountingLineUoMs": [
                {
                    "LineNumber": 1,
                    "ChildNumber": 1,
                    "CountedQuantity": 90.0
                }
            ]
        }, {
            "LineNumber": 2,
            "ItemCode": "2",
            "WarehouseCode": "2",
            "BinEntry":2,
            "InventoryCountingLineUoMs": [
                {
                    "LineNumber": 2,
                    "ChildNumber": 1,
                    "CountedQuantity": 90.0
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
    }
 
This is the data:
ItemCodeWarehouseCodeBinEntryLineNumberChildNumberCountedQuantity
1111127650
222214000

 

 

Thank you in Advanced!

entry.title: Re: Register new Service Unit in Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

Please make sure database server for Service Unit is up and learning and SLD agent for the database server is correctly installed and running too. 

SLD agent on the DB server should appear in the Cloud Control Center under Landscape Management > SLD Agents.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: Re: how to register Web Client on Cloud Control Center
entry.content:
Hello,

Web Client needs to be registered in the software components beforehand.

 

Regards

EunSeok

entry.title: "CST No." "" (for "Location" "asigned to "Warehouse" "" and assigned to "Branch" ") does not match
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing error while generated update the warehouse location.  Error like : 

"CST No." "" (for "Location" "Gurugram-1", assigned to "Warehouse" "Gurugram Storage 2" and assigned to "Branch" "GURUGRAM") does not match "Branch GST No." XXXXXXXXXX

SAP Business One, 

When I am changing the Location into warehouse master under same branch then facing this type of error. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Duvidas SAP One Business e Módulo S/4Hana
entry.content:
Bom dia!

Eu costumava usar o SAP S/4Hana módulo MM e agora estou usando o One Business, porém estou sentindo uma diferença enorme, principalmente em encontrar algumas funções para o setor de Compras.

 

1. No S/4Hana era possível acessar um tela com todos os pedidos já colocado, onde apareciam a quantidade dos itens solicitados, quantidade já entregue e pendente, existe essa função no One Business?

 

2. Estou procurando também uma tela onde consigo rastrear o histórico de compras de um determinado item no One Business, para saber quais foram os fornecedores que já venderam desse item para nós e quanto já foi pago em cada compra.

 

3. É possível filtrar todos os pedidos que foram colocado e o status deles, sejam em aprovação ou já aprovados?

 

4. No módulo MM, para selecionar várias células, bastava clicar em "Ctrl+Y" e selecionar, no One Business existe algo assim?

 

Obrigado desde já.

entry.title: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to 2405
entry.content:
Hello expert 

I Install Suse Linux 15 and fresh Install Sap 10.00.2402 Also upgrade database Sap 10.00.200 = Done

SAP UPGRADATION DONE FROM ver: B1H10002402HF to ver:B1H1000_2405

BUT

when I upgrade database from 2402 to 2405 we are facing error

Please find attachment error log & error print screen

 

Regards

Neeraj Upadhyay

entry.title: SUB BOM AND MRP CALCULATION
entry.content:
Dear All

I'm looking for the right process to manage sub bom's into a global bom (Sap B1, Hana).

I can create a BOM of production (item A) with 2 other production bom's inside (without stages)

- item B (component X and 2 days of labor)

- item C ( component Y and 3 days of labor).

When I run MRP for item A it doesn't calculate the expected date. Recommendation is proposing 2 production orders (B+C) but without calculation time of each sub Bom. So all production orders are placed on the latest day (due date of item A) instead of 3 days before the due date (date of the larger sub item time, C).

Thank you for the support

(sorry for my poor explanation in English)

PP

entry.title: Substituir lista de condição de pagamentos SAP Business One.
entry.content:
Seria possível substituir a lista de condição de pagamentos que fica na aba contabilidade de um pedido de compra para listar somente condições ativas?

Criamos um campo definido pelo usuário como Ativo (Sim/Não) para determinar se a condição esta ativa ou não, foi necessário para fazer a integração com nosso Ponto de Venda. 

Porém dentro do Pedido de compra é listado todos as condições, e as vezes o comprador não sabe qual esta ativa ou não.

É possível substituir essa lista por uma consulta formatada onde filtro quais condições estão ativas ?

Obrigado.

entry.title: Can i purchase More sap b1 licenses if im not paying amc for previous years
entry.content:
As per the subject states can I purchase further licenses, as we've not been paying amc for the last 3-4 years?

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: (69) controleer valuta can Items bij ITem Cost
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting this error message - (69) Controleer Valuta can Items bij ITem Cost when trying to add an A/P Invoice copied from Goods Receipt PO with a discount. How do I fix this?

Thank you.

entry.title: WTax Non-Subject Amount in Invoice Sap Business One
entry.content:
hi

i have one question, how does the WTax Non-Subject Amount field in the AP invoice table gets updated? we have several invoices that have zero amount, before that field got always populated

thanks for the support

entry.title: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking to see if anyone can give me guidance on the landed cost functionality. I have watched many YouTube videos and read many articles. The one thing I cannot tell is if this feature is customizable or not. From what I have seen then the standard use case will not work for what I am trying to do. 

I am trying to apply a standard freight costs to my incoming raw material through the GRPO with a journal entry of:

Debit - Raw Material
Credit - Standard Raw Material
Credit - Standard Freight 

Is landed cost the right function for this set up

Any advice would be helpful
